item.title: Gateway WebSocket client
steps: Create src/gateway/ package (websocket.ts, health.ts, config-rpc.ts per ARCHITECTURE.md)
In websocket.ts: implement token-authenticated WebSocket client to Gateway at :18789
Implement request/response RPC pattern with typed message envelopes and timeout handling
In health.ts: implement health check polling against :18789/healthz — Gateway must be healthy before further operations
In config-rpc.ts: implement config.patch and config.apply wrappers that respect the rate limit (3 req/60s)
Implement graceful fallback: when Gateway is down, direct filesystem write is used instead of RPC
Handle connection errors, auth failures, and rate limit responses with typed error classes
Write unit tests with a mock WebSocket server
acceptanceCriteria: WebSocket client authenticates to Gateway and sends/receives typed RPC messages
Health check polling correctly reports gateway up/down status
config.patch respects 3 req/60s rate limit (queues or errors on excess)
Fallback to direct filesystem write works when Gateway is unavailable
Unit tests pass with a mock WebSocket server — no live Gateway required
All operations accept AbortSignal for cancellation
